title: Slide 15: 2D SPHERES
prompt: Presentation slide 15: "2D SPHERES". A chart of 3 percentage values (80%, 60%, 70%). Geometric, axis-aligned. In 3D, lift to sphere fill-level gauges — one sphere per value, each filled to its percentage (the sphere-fill atom), equal radii so the FILL carries the value on a stage with the title floating above — corporate keynote aesthetic, not naturalistic.
